//: Copy this to mcp.json (gitignored) and add the MCP servers you want Nexus to use.
//how: Each server is a command Nexus launches over stdio. Its tools become usable by the Integrations agent automatically. Restart Nexus after editing.

filesystem.//: Gives Nexus read/write access to a folder. Change the last arg to your path.

github.//: GitHub repos/issues/PRs. Needs a token in env (kept out of git).
